stories.headline: India secures massive $30B data center investment boosting global AI and cloud infrastructure

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: India’s digital infrastructure journey is gathering remarkable momentum. AirTrunk has announced plans to invest around Rs. 3 lakh crore ($30 billion) in India, and develop 5 GW of data centre capacity.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Japan is converting used cooking oil into sustainable aviation fuel to power greener flights. Cuba battles blackouts, shortages and a worsening economic crisis. India's economy grew 7.7%, but inflation and oil prices remain major concerns

stories.headline: Zelenskyy marks 82nd anniversary of D-Day, links to Ukraine's fight against Russia

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Today is the 82nd anniversary of D-Day – the Allied landings in Normandy... We are working to make it happen again today... Glory to Ukraine!

stories.headline: Ukraine strikes Russian oil refinery 2000km deep in Tyumen

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Incredible night for Ukraine, taking out Russian oil infrastructure and military targets from St Petersburg to the Urals. 2000km from Ukraine, in Tyumen, the Antipinsky Oil Refinery, capacity 9 million tons/year burns after early morning strikes.

stories.headline: DC Reflecting Pool restored under Trump

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: We took a family trip to the Lincoln Monument tonight to check out the new reflecting pool. Absolutely stunning. DC is so beautiful again, just in time for our Nation’s 250th.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: The water is ON, the Reflecting Pool is reflecting, and D.C. is looking better than ever. We are so back. THANK YOU, PRESIDENT TRUMP.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: More than half of the publicly identified donors to President Trump’s White House ballroom project have won new or expanded federal contracts worth more than $50 billion.

stories.headline: S&P 500 erases nearly $2 trillion after strong jobs report, Bitcoin down over 50% from highs
stories.body:
What just happened?

The S&P 500 just erased nearly -$2 TRILLION of market cap just hours after 3rd strongest US jobs report in 18 months.

Meanwhile, Bitcoin is officially down over -50% from its record high in October 2025.

What's happening? Let us explain.

(a thread)

stories.headline: $1.75 trillion wiped out from US stock market and $130B from crypto
stories.body:
JUST IN: 🇺🇸 $1.75 trillion wiped out from the US stock market today.

$130,000,000,000 wiped out from the crypto market cap.

stories.headline: Bitcoin long-term chart shows broken uptrend and potential head-and-shoulders top
stories.body: Look at this long-term Bitcoin chart. The uptrend off the Dec. 2022 low is broken. There's a huge head-and-shoulders top forming. The most likely resolution is a retest of the longer-term uptrend off the Dec. 2018 low. If it holds, that puts a bottom between $25,000 and $27,000.

stories.headline: TensorAuto unveils prototype robo-car showcasing autonomous mobility engineering
stories.body:
This is what the future of autonomous mobility looks like — and we brought it to Wall Street.

@TensorAuto rolled their prototype robo-car into the New York Stock Exchange ahead of today's #theCUBE Wired interview, giving us a full 360° look at what they've been building. From the sensor suite to the chassis design, it's a remarkable piece of engineering.

Their executives are joining us today from our @NYSE  Studios to break down the technology, the roadmap, and what's next for autonomous vehicles.

Follow the future. 📷
https://t.co/yoSYUurhgT

#AutonomousVehicles #Robotics #Tensor #theCUBE #NYSE #AI #Innovation
@furrier @bjbaumann2014  @GemmaAllenSays

stories.headline: NASA X-59 achieves first supersonic flight milestone.
stories.body:
✈️ JUST IN: The X-59 has gone supersonic! 

The X-59 achieved supersonic speeds for the first time ever today — a major milestone for NASA’s Quesst mission and an important step toward upcoming flights that will demonstrate its quiet supersonic technology ahead of future community overflights. 

Fast now. Quiet soon. 🔊➡️🤫 

Learn more: https://t.co/lpVA3qRxAj

#NASA #X59 #Quesst

stories.body: 🚨: Scientists plan to teleport an entire human, and a new quantum breakthrough could finally make it a reality

stories.headline: Special ops training with aircraft in Long Beach and Pasadena areas of Southern California.
stories.body:
Special operations forces conducted realistic training in an urban environment overnight in the Long Beach/Pasadena areas of Southern California, including aircraft of the U.S. Army's 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment (SOAR). This training is conducted by U.S. Army Delta Force, U.S. Navy SEALs, and other special forces units in major cities around the country several times per year.

Video from Long Beach Local News

stories.headline: Surf punk video highlighting territorial beach culture in Southern California
stories.body:
The Surf Punks - "My Beach" (1982)

Surf punk is a pretty reactionary subgenre. It's highly territorial, it's all about making the non-locals go away so they can't talk to the chicks and party with them on the beach. Very good attitude, I approve.

stories.headline: Classic June gloom expected across Southern California this week
stories.body: A series of low pressure systems will bring cloud cover to Southern California communities this week as part of a “classic June gloom” before temperatures rise later on next week, the National Weather Service says. https://ktla.com/weather/classic-june-gloom-in-store-for-southern-california-before-eventual-warming-trend-nws/

stories.headline: Epstein documents reveal alleged cannibalism and ritual abuse
stories.body:
🇺🇸🧐Epstein case revelations: U.S. Congresswoman Lauren Boebert stunned Newsmax after reviewing the unredacted Epstein documents:
“It’s far darker than anyone could have imagined: emails about torture, constant references to ‘consumption,’ a place literally called the ‘Cannibal Restaurant,’ and code words like ‘jerky’ and ‘human meat’ being tossed around as if it were nothing.”
Yes. She directly asked whether we are dealing with cannibalism. With literal human consumption.
This is no longer some fringe theory. A sitting member of Congress is openly saying what no one else dares to say: these monsters not only abused and trafficked children — they may have eaten them as well.
And the women? Ghislaine Maxwell, Rachel Chandler, and an entire network of female predators were deeply involved in delivering children into this nightmare machine.
This isn’t “elite pedophilia.” This is satanic depravity. This is ritualized evil in suits and private jets. The documents are so horrifying, she warns, that the public may not be ready for them. But you know what?
We are more than ready. We are furious.
Enough redactions. Enough excuses about “national security.” Enough protecting these flesh-eating demons. Release every page. Name every name. Burn their world down.
The American people deserve the truth — even if it makes us sick.
Especially if it makes us sick.

stories.headline: Obama alleged treason in Russia collusion conspiracy
stories.body:
Obama committed TREASON by executing Hillary Clinton's plan to frame Trump, cover up their crimes, and steal the 2016 election.

He greenlit a second fabricated ICA after no collusion was found, with Brennan overriding the CIA, injecting the fake Steele Dossier to create it.

The FBI and IC spied on Trump's campaign and spread the Russia hoax with the MSM. This is the greatest grand conspiracy in American history, still unfolding today. It's time to flush these traitors out and finish the job.
